title: Roadmap graph dependency manifest (deps.yaml)
description: Per-feature-folder edge declarations for the roadmap dependency graph. All keys optional; absent means no edges of that kind. COMP-ROADMAP-GRAPH-1.

depends_on.description: Feature codes that are prerequisites of this feature.

concurrent_with.description: Sibling feature codes with no blocking relationship.

blocks.description: Feature codes that this feature is a prerequisite of (inverse convenience).
